selected_important_turn.text: I need at least one ration of food.  Would it be ok with me:  3 firewood and 1 each of food and water.  If you are ok with that, I am too.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn concretely shaped the deal: you proposed and locked in a split that secured all 3 firewood (your top priority) and guaranteed minimal food/water. The opponent accepted shortly after, so this move determined the final allocation and fairness of the outcome.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: It converts a cooperative momentum (the opponent had just offered a prosocial split) into a self-favoring final proposal without using the bargaining leverage to improve joint or fairness outcomes. You missed a chance to frame a mutual trade or to offer a small concession that would meaningfully increase perceived fairness or relationship quality.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Instead of pushing a zero-sum confirmation, explicitly acknowledge the opponent's concession and propose a small compensating trade or reciprocity (e.g., keep the firewood but offer a tiny concession on food/water or promise future reciprocity). Frame the proposal as a trade that compensates their larger water need so it reads as fair and reciprocal.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: small decrease if unchanged; small increase if you reshape into an integrative trade (you can preserve utility while creating perceived value)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: would increase if you add a modest concession or reciprocity framing
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: would remain high; slightly smoother if framed cooperatively

value2reason.Low: My favorite food is buffet food.  I will miss that so the more food for me the better.
value2reason.Medium: My spouse calls me a water buffalo so that tells you how much water I consume.
value2reason.High: I am from the South so anything below 80 degrees is cold to me.  I need firewood or else I do the opposite of melt.

value2reason.Low: It's a hot summer day, and all my food is prepackaged, so I don't need any wood
value2reason.Medium: I'll be very hungry after the hike so I'll need a lot of food
value2reason.High: I'll be going on a hike around the area so I'll be very thirsty on this hot day

dialogue.text: I am so excited to go camping!  I am planning a nice long walk in the woods to decompress from the hectic days of working.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I am too.  I've been thinking of this since COVID.  I hear we have some materials to share between the two of us.  What are you thinking?  For me, I am from the South so I get cold easily 🙂 so firewood is my main priority.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Perfect!  I'm a northerner, so the firewood is all yours!  I'll need lot's of water to keep hydrated after the hike, and I'll probably be pretty hungry too.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: My spouse calls me a water buffalo so I'm pretty water dependent if you couldn't tell.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: That's good.  Best way to stay healthy is with water.  How about you take 1 water and all the firewood?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need at least one ration of food.  Would it be ok with me:  3 firewood and 1 each of food and water.  If you are ok with that, I am too.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Thanks for the offer. I really value your willingness to share water. Since firewood is my top priority, I'd like to keep all 3 firewood packages. In return, I can offer you 1 extra food package to balance the trade. How does that sound?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I appreciate your offer, but I need more water than just one food package. Let’s try this: I’ll take 2 water, 1 food, and give you 1 food and 2 firewood. That way, I get more water and you get some firewood. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand your need for more water. Since firewood is my top priority, I'm happy to keep all 3 firewood packages. In exchange, I'll offer you 2 food packages instead of 1 to better balance the trade. Does that work for you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I see your point about firewood. Since I value water most, I’m willing to accept 2 food packages and 1 firewood in exchange for 2 water. That way, I get more water, and you get some firewood. Let’s make it a deal.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
